title: Bloodbowl Flat Swarm
description: Bloodbowl reset or loose ball near centre field. Open-field convergence must produce tackles, knockdowns, and breakouts quickly — no spreading or safe carries across the flat open field.

expected_outcomes.description: Players from both teams converge quickly on the ball.
Collisions, tackles, and knockdowns occur during convergence.
A player can break from the swarm and carry in open field — but not safely all the way.

must_not_outcomes.description: Players avoid the contest zone and stay spread — no swarm forms.
Carrier runs unopposed from reset to goal with no realistic interception opportunity.

notes: This is the canonical Bloodbowl vertical slice. The open flat geometry makes it the benchmark for swarm density and carrier danger in unobstructed space.
